---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change to context-bridge.
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem you're solving

<what's the situation today that makes you want this? what does it cost?>

## Proposed solution

<your suggested shape — be as specific as you can. a sketch beats a paragraph.>

## Alternatives considered

<what else could solve this? why was your proposal preferred?>

## Scope

This belongs in:

- [ ] v0.1.x (small additive change to existing v0.1 surface)
- [ ] v0.2 (next planned version — monorepo, cross-tool, search, lint)
- [ ] v0.3+ (later — team-shared, MCP, web UI)
- [ ] Out of scope for context-bridge (and that's OK — what should it go in instead?)

## Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking change.
- [ ] Breaking change — explain migration path.
- [ ] Adds a new dependency — explain why it's worth it.

## Attribution

If this is inspired by or derived from another project / paper / convention, link it. Attribution rigor is a project value — see [CREDITS.md](../../CREDITS.md).
